expectations.text: Flags generated artifacts instead of committing them automatically.
expectations.evidence: Staged set includes generated artifacts: playwright-report/index.html and test-results/session-flow/video.mp4.

expectations.text: Asks for confirmation before versioning those artifacts.
expectations.evidence: Unstage generated artifacts, keep only source files (for example src/audit/session_log.py), then rerun commit.

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
